channel.title: GitHub Julia Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Julia in GitHub

item.title: JuliaRegistries/General
item.description: The official registry of general Julia packages

item.title: EnzymeAD/Reactant.jl
item.description: Optimize Julia Functions With MLIR and XLA for High-Performance Execution on CPU, GPU, TPU and more.

item.title: ITensor/ITensors.jl
item.description: A Julia library for efficient tensor computations and tensor network calculations. ITensor is supported by the Simons Foundation's Flatiron Institute.

item.title: CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
item.description: ClimaAtmos.jl is a library for building atmospheric circulation models that is designed from the outset to leverage data assimilation and machine learning tools. We welcome contributions!

item.title: aviatesk/JET.jl
item.description: An experimental code analyzer for Julia. No need for additional type annotations.

item.title: JuliaPlots/Plots.jl
item.description: Powerful convenience for Julia visualizations and data analysis

item.title: oscar-system/Oscar.jl
item.description: A comprehensive open source computer algebra system for computations in algebra, geometry, and number theory.

item.title: trixi-framework/Trixi.jl
item.description: Trixi.jl: Adaptive high-order numerical simulations of conservation laws in Julia

item.title: FluxML/Flux.jl
item.description: Relax! Flux is the ML library that doesn't make you tensor

item.title: EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
item.description: Julia bindings for the Enzyme automatic differentiator

item.title: MakieOrg/Makie.jl
item.description: Interactive data visualizations and plotting in Julia
